title: centaurea × subdecurrens subsp. albuferae
intro: Centaurea × subdecurrens subsp. albuferae, also known as a hybrid of Centaurea species, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea × subdecurrens subsp. albuferae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
